<% local dispatcher = require "luci.dispatcher" local status_url = dispatcher.build_url("admin", "services", "ikuai-bypass", "status") local latest_url = dispatcher.build_url("admin", "services", "ikuai-bypass", "latest") local install_url = dispatcher.build_url("admin", "services", "ikuai-bypass", "install") %>

Stable means GitHub releases with prerelease=false. Prerelease means GitHub releases with prerelease=true. This package stays architecture-independent and installs the matching CLI only when you click the install button.
